                        "import re\n\ndef match_a_followed_by_bs(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks if the input string matches the pattern: 'a' followed by one or more 'b's.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): Input string to check.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if the string matches, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # ^a means string starts with 'a'\n    # b+ means one or more 'b's immediately after 'a'\n    # $ means end of string\n    pattern = r'^ab+$'\n    return bool(re.match(pattern, s))\n\n# Example usage:\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    test_cases = [\n        \"ab\",      # True\n        \"abb\",     # True\n        \"abbb\",    # True\n        \"a\",       # False\n        \"b\",       # False\n        \"aab\",     # False\n        \"abbbx\",   # False\n        \"xabbb\",   # False\n    ]\n\n    for test in test_cases:\n        print(f\"{test!r}: {match_a_followed_by_bs(test)}\")",

                        "import unittest\nfrom typing import Any\nimport re\n\n# The function under test\ndef match_a_followed_by_bs(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks if the input string matches the pattern: 'a' followed by one or more 'b's.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): The input string to check.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if the string matches the pattern, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    pattern = r'^ab+$'\n    return bool(re.match(pattern, s))\n\n\nclass TestMatchAFollowedByBs(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def test_basic_matches(self):\n        # Standard cases\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb\"))  # Long sequence\n\n    def test_no_b_after_a(self):\n        # Edge case: only 'a'\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\"))\n        # Edge case: 'a' followed by nothing\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"\"))\n\n    def test_no_a_at_start(self):\n        # Only 'b's\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bb\"))\n        # 'b' before 'a'\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"babb\"))\n\n    def test_extra_characters(self):\n        # Extra 'a' at start\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aaabb\"))\n        # Extra characters at end\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbx\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbc\"))\n        # Extra characters at start\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"cab\"))\n        # Extra characters in the middle\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abcb\"))\n\n    def test_case_sensitivity(self):\n        # Lowercase only matches\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab\"))\n        # Uppercase does not match\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"Ab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aB\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"AB\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"AbB\"))\n\n    def test_non_string_inputs(self):\n        # Should not match, but also should not error\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(str(123)))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(str(None)))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(str([])))\n\n    def test_unicode_and_whitespace(self):\n        # Unicode characters\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aβ\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a b\"))\n        # Whitespace at start or end\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\" ab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab \"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\" ab \"))\n        # Embedded whitespace\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a b b\"))\n\n    def test_only_ab(self):\n        # Only 'a' followed by one or more 'b's, nothing else\n        for n in range(1, 20):\n            s = \"a\" + (\"b\" * n)\n            self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(s), f\"Failed for {s}\")\n\n    def test_false_for_similar_patterns(self):\n        # 'a' followed by zero 'b's\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\"))\n        # 'a' followed by other letters\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ac\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abc\"))\n        # 'a' followed by b's and then other letters\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbc\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbd\"))\n        # 'a' not at start\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bab\"))\n\n    def test_empty_string(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"\"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()",

Standard valid cases\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbbbb\"))\n    \n    def test_missing_b(self):\n        # 'a' only, no 'b'\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\"))\n    \n    def test_missing_a(self):\n        # No 'a' at start\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bb\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bbb\"))\n    \n    def test_extra_a(self):\n        # Extra 'a' at start or in middle\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aaabb\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aba\"))\n    \n    def test_extra_characters(self):\n        #                     "best_code": "import re\n\ndef match_a_followed_by_bs(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks if the input string matches the pattern: 'a' followed by one or more 'b's.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): The input string to check.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if the string matches the pattern, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # ^a means string starts with 'a'\n    # b+ means one or more 'b's\n    # $ means string ends after the b's\n    pattern = r'^ab+$'\n    return bool(re.match(pattern, s))\n\n# Example usage and test cases\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    test_strings = [\n        \"ab\",      # True\n        \"abb\",     # True\n        \"abbb\",    # True\n        \"a\",       # False (no 'b' after 'a')\n        \"b\",       # False (no 'a' at start)\n        \"aab\",     # False (extra 'a')\n        \"abbbb\",   # True\n        \"acb\",     # False\n        \"abbbx\",   # False (extra character at end)\n        \"abbbbbb\", # True\n    ]\n    for s in test_strings:\n        print(f\"{s!r}: {match_a_followed_by_bs(s)}\")",
                    "best_tests": "import unittest\nfrom typing import Any\n\n# The function under test\nimport re\n\ndef match_a_followed_by_bs(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks if the input string matches the pattern: 'a' followed by one or more 'b's.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): The input string to check.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if the string matches the pattern, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    pattern = r'^ab+$'\n    return bool(re.match(pattern, s))\n\nclass TestMatchAFollowedByBs(unittest.TestCase):\n    # Standard matching cases\n    def test_single_b(self):\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab\"))\n\n    def test_multiple_bs(self):\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbbbb\"))\n\n    # Edge cases: not enough b's, extra characters, wrong order\n    def test_no_b_after_a(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\"))\n\n    def test_no_a_at_start(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bb\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"baab\"))\n\n    def test_extra_a_at_start(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aaabbb\"))\n\n    def test_extra_characters_at_end(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbbx\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abb1\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"abbb \"))\n\n    def test_extra_characters_at_start(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"xab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"zabbb\"))\n\n    def test_wrong_order(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bba\"))\n\n    def test_empty_string(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"\"))\n\n    def test_only_a(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\"))\n\n    def test_only_b(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"bb\"))\n\n    def test_case_sensitivity(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"Ab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aB\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"AB\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"aBb\"))\n\n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # Should raise TypeError if non-string is passed\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            match_a_followed_by_bs(None)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            match_a_followed_by_bs(123)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            match_a_followed_by_bs(['ab'])\n\n    def test_unicode_and_whitespace(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab \"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\" ab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\\nb\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\\tb\"))\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"ab😊\"))\n\n    def test_long_valid_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\" + \"b\"*1000))\n\n    def test_long_invalid_string(self):\n        self.assertFalse(match_a_followed_by_bs(\"a\" + \"b\"*1000 + \"c\"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()",
                    "passed_count": 16,
